---
title: 'Managing air quality by ''Data Mining'': Exploratory statistical analysis to determine causal factors affecting pollutant
  concentrations close to a motorway'
date: '2007-01-01'
author:
- A. Bywaters
- J. White
- K. McCabe
- P.J. Taylor
- D. Carslaw
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*14th World Congress on Intelligent Transport Systems, ITS 2007*'
---

## Managing air quality by 'Data Mining': Exploratory statistical analysis to determine causal factors affecting pollutant concentrations close to a motorway

<p class="pub-meta">A. Bywaters, J. White, K. McCabe, P.J. Taylor, D. Carslaw</p>

_*14th World Congress on Intelligent Transport Systems, ITS 2007*_, 2007


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2007-c.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
